title: AI Fact or Fiction: The Fable Ban, Tokenmaxxing, Saaspocolypse — With Ara Kharazian
summary: Ara Kharazian, lead economist at Ramp, discusses which AI industry narratives are real versus exaggerated. Topics include Anthropic's rise over OpenAI in business adoption, variability in AI spending across companies, whether tokenmaxxing is occurring, and whether the predicted SaaS apocalypse is materializing.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz hosts Ramp lead economist Ara Kharazian to sort which AI industry narratives hold up against spending data and which are overstated. The discussion covers Anthropic's rise over OpenAI in business adoption, the wide variability in AI spending across companies, whether tokenmaxxing is actually occurring, and whether the predicted SaaS apocalypse is materializing. It matters because Ramp's vantage point on corporate purchasing offers a check on claims that often run on speculation rather than observed behavior.
